issues.suggested_version_or_action: Choose a single go_router version across all packages (e.g. align other manifests to ^17.0.1 or move all to the latest stable) and test for breaking changes
issues.reason: Conflicting go_router versions across manifests can cause dependency resolution failures or runtime breakage due to API changes between major/minor releases.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Update to match the main app (e.g. ^17.0.1) or pick a single version for all packages and verify migrations
issues.reason: Companion app uses an older go_router; mismatched versions cause inconsistent behavior and resolution conflicts.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Align all packages to ^5.7.0 (or the latest 5.x stable) and run integration tests
issues.reason: Different dio versions across packages may yield incompatible transitive dependencies or API differences.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Bump to ^5.7.0 (or chosen unified version) to avoid resolution mismatches
issues.reason: Shared-code uses an older dio release than the main app; unify versions to avoid conflicts.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Align other packages to ^1.2.0 or update all to the latest stable http release
issues.reason: Multiple http versions across manifests increase risk of transitive conflicts and subtle runtime differences.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Upgrade to ^1.2.0 (or the selected unified version) and run tests
issues.reason: Shared-code specifies an older http version than the root package; unify to ensure consistent behavior.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Use a single `shared_preferences` version across packages (e.g. ^2.3.2 or latest) and check migration notes
issues.reason: Differing versions of platform plugins can cause runtime incompatibilities and unexpected API/behavior changes.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Update to ^2.3.2 (or chosen unified version) to match root and reduce resolution issues
issues.reason: Companion app uses an older version; mismatches between shared and app packages can produce build/runtime issues.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Align xml versions across packages (e.g. ^6.5.0) or update all to latest compatible
issues.reason: Different minor versions of libraries like xml may contain breaking fixes/changes; keep consistent across packages.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Bump to ^6.5.0 (or unified version) to avoid resolution conflicts
issues.reason: Shared-code specifies an older xml package than the main app; unify versions to avoid mismatch.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Unify cached_network_image across manifests (e.g. ^3.3.1) or update to latest stable
issues.reason: Small version differences can affect caching behavior and transitive dependencies (flutter_cache_manager).

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Update to ^3.3.1 (or chosen unified version) to match the main app
issues.reason: Different versions between packages may cause dependency resolution or subtle behavior differences.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Align path_provider across manifests (e.g. ^2.1.2 or latest) and test platform behavior
issues.reason: Platform plugins across different versions may require different Android/iOS embedding or SDK settings.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Bump to ^2.1.2 (or unified version) to prevent resolution mismatches
issues.reason: Shared-code uses slightly older path_provider; unify to avoid multi-version plugin issues.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Use a single intl version across packages (e.g. ^0.20.2) or upgrade all to latest stable and run localization tests
issues.reason: Different intl versions across packages can produce conflicting generated messages or API differences.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Upgrade to ^0.20.2 (or unified version) to match app and avoid incompatibilities
issues.reason: Shared-code uses an older intl release; unify versions to reduce risks with formatting/localization APIs.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Standardize lints across repository (prefer ^6.0.0 where used) and update analysis_options if needed
issues.reason: Different lint versions across packages mean inconsistent static analysis rules and may produce noise or missed rules.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Upgrade to ^6.0.0 (or chosen repo-wide lint version) and adjust `analysis_options.yaml` as necessary
issues.reason: Older flutter_lints may be incompatible with newer SDK constraints or expected lint rules in the repo.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Verify sqflite is at the intended version; if older, consider upgrading to latest 2.x stable; if relying on ffi, ensure dev_dependency matches
issues.reason: Database packages often receive bug/security fixes; confirm dev/runtime dependencies are aligned (sqflite_common_ffi present as dev_dependency).

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Document why local override exists; consider using the official package version or keep this in sync with pub.dev releases
issues.reason: Local overrides can hide upstream fixes/security patches; keep a maintenance plan or re-adopt official package when possible.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Document purpose and ensure the shim is maintained; prefer official package or upstream fixes where feasible
issues.reason: Local shim packages may omit security fixes or platform integration code; they require manual maintenance.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Verify native ML Kit compatibility and update to the latest plugin versions and corresponding Android/iOS native SDKs
issues.reason: ML/ML Kit plugins often require matching native SDK versions; outdated plugin versions may have bugs or security issues.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Document why `force` is used; remove forced versions if not required or align all TF-lite consumers to the forced version after testing
issues.reason: Forcing versions can mask incompatible transitive dependencies and cause runtime crashes; prefer explicit dependency alignment and testing.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Same as above: confirm necessity for forcing, consider BOM or explicit dependency versions in modules
issues.reason: Forcing native/NDK-linked libraries can lead to ABI or runtime mismatches if other modules expect different builds.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Consider upgrading to the latest stable Media3 release and confirm API/behavior changes
issues.reason: Media libraries receive bug and security fixes; older versions may miss critical fixes for streaming, DRM, or CVEs.

issues.suggested_version_or_action: Move `android:largeHeap` to AndroidManifest application tag (use `android:largeHeap="true"`) and avoid setting `applicationName` via manifestPlaceholders unless required; document reasons
issues.reason: Setting `android:largeHeap` via manifestPlaceholders is nonstandard and may not apply; application attributes are normally set directly in AndroidManifest.
